slides.layer5_body: Hyperledger Besu, Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, any EVM chain

slides.cta_subtext: Contact SettleMint to discuss a pilot program for your digital asset operations.

slides.title: Before after numbers
slides.before_body: Average time to build custom blockchain infrastructure for digital asset operations
slides.after_body: From configuration to production deployment with full compliance and custody

slides.title: Benefit grid 3
slides.benefit1_body: Deploy compliant digital asset operations in weeks, not months. Pre-built templates eliminate custom blockchain development.
slides.benefit2_body: ERC-3643 modules validate every transfer before execution. No separate compliance layer needed.
slides.benefit3_body: Start with one asset type, expand to all seven without re-platforming. Same compliance and identity layer across all.

slides.title: Big number hero
slides.stat1_body: Bonds, deposits, stablecoins, equity, funds, real estate, and precious metals. All on one platform.

slides.title: Decision tree 2
slides.question_text: Does the institution have existing blockchain infrastructure?
slides.yes_body:
Hybrid deployment:
DALP connects to existing chain
ISMARTCustodian bridges custody
Compliance modules added on top
slides.no_body:
Full DALP deployment:
New EVM network provisioned
Complete platform setup
End-to-end lifecycle management

slides.title: Definition list 4
slides.def1_definition: Permissioned token standard with embedded compliance. Every transfer is validated against identity claims and policy modules before execution.
slides.def2_definition: On-chain identity framework providing cryptographic attestation for KYC, AML, and investor classification with reusable claims.
slides.def3_definition: Smart contract extension enabling forced transfers, address freezing, and wallet recovery for regulatory and compliance scenarios.
slides.def4_definition: Cross-venue payment and delivery-versus-payment atomic settlement using hash time-locked contracts (HTLCs).

slides.title: Dependency chain 4
slides.dep1_body: OnchainID verification, KYC claims, trusted issuers, investor classification
slides.dep2_body: Transfer restrictions, eligibility rules, jurisdiction controls, holding limits
slides.dep3_body: Issuance, transfers, corporate actions, distributions, redemptions
slides.dep4_body: Regulatory reports, audit trails, compliance evidence, real-time dashboards

slides.title: Executive summary
slides.para1_text: SettleMint's DALP provides institutions with complete infrastructure for tokenizing, issuing, and managing digital assets across the full lifecycle. The platform serves as a unified operational layer connecting asset originators, compliance teams, custodians, and investors.
slides.para2_text: Built on ERC-3643 with 13 composable SMART extensions, DALP supports seven asset types: bonds, deposits, stablecoins, equity, funds, real estate, and precious metals. Each asset type ships with built-in compliance rules, identity verification, and operational tooling.
slides.para3_text: Institutions deploy to production in weeks using pre-built templates. The platform handles compliance enforcement, investor management, corporate action processing, and regulatory reporting across jurisdictions through a single interface with role-based access control.

slides.title: Faq pairs 3
slides.faq1_question: What blockchain networks does DALP support?
slides.faq1_answer: DALP deploys on any EVM-compatible chain: Hyperledger Besu, Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, and private networks.
slides.faq2_answer: Standard deployment takes 4-8 weeks from configuration to production, including compliance setup and integration testing.
slides.faq3_question: Can we use our existing custody provider?
slides.faq3_answer: Yes. DALP integrates with custody providers through the ISMARTCustodian extension and standard API connectors.

slides.title: Gantt 3
slides.track1_text: Platform setup and first asset deployment

slides.title: Grid 3x1
slides.card1_body: Maturity dates, coupon schedules, redemption logic. Automated yield distribution with ISMARTYield and ISMARTRedeemable extensions.
slides.card2_body: Collateral ratio enforcement via ISMARTCollateral. Reserve monitoring, AML checks on every transfer.
slides.card3_body: Dividend distribution, on-chain governance via IVotes (ERC-5805). Shareholder vote delegation and checkpointing.

slides.title: Grid 4x1
slides.card1_body: Select asset type and define parameters in the Asset Designer
slides.card2_body: Deploy contracts to your chosen EVM network
slides.card3_body: Manage issuance, transfers, and corporate actions
slides.card4_body: Track compliance, performance, and audit trails

slides.title: Growth indicators 3
slides.metric1_body: Across all deployed asset classes on the platform
slides.metric3_body: Active identity claims managed via OnchainID

slides.title: Hero statement
slides.msg1_text: One platform for the entire digital asset lifecycle
slides.msg1_subtext: From configuration to redemption, DALP handles issuance, compliance, custody, and servicing.

slides.title: Highlight box
slides.highlight_body: DALP is the only platform that covers the entire digital asset lifecycle from asset design through compliance, issuance, servicing, and redemption on a single control plane. Seven asset types, 13 composable extensions, and pre-built compliance modules for MiCA, MAS, VARA, SEC, and FCA jurisdictions.

slides.title: Icon highlight 3
slides.item1_body: Every transfer validated against jurisdictional requirements before execution. ERC-3643 modules enforce eligibility, restrictions, and holding limits automatically.
slides.item2_body: One platform handles design, deployment, onboarding, issuance, transfers, corporate actions, reporting, and decommissioning.
slides.item3_body: Seven asset types share a common compliance and identity layer. Start with bonds, expand to deposits, stablecoins, equity without re-platforming.

slides.title: Icon text grid
slides.item1_body: ERC-3643 modules validate eligibility before execution
slides.item2_body: OnchainID provides KYC/AML attestation with reusable claims
slides.item3_body: ISMARTCustodian handles forced transfers and freeze/unfreeze
slides.item4_body: Automated coupons, dividends, redemptions, fee collection
slides.item5_body: Deploy to Besu, Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche from one interface
slides.item6_body: Metrics, logs, traces with pre-built Grafana dashboards

slides.title: Input output
slides.input_body: Asset type, compliance framework, jurisdiction, custody provider
slides.process_body: Configure, deploy, validate, and activate digital asset operations
slides.output_body: Compliant tokens, investor onboarding, lifecycle management, reporting

EVM chains only (no non-EVM support)

Requires OnchainID for identity

Initial compliance configuration needed

Blockchain expertise for self-hosting

slides.title: Pullquote attribution
slides.quote_text: DALP transformed our digital asset operations from a 14-month custom build into a governed, repeatable process that went live in 6 weeks.

slides.title: Three pillars
slides.pillar1_body: Every token enforces transfer restrictions before execution. ERC-3643 compliance modules validate investor eligibility at the contract level.
slides.pillar2_body: One platform covers asset design, deployment, onboarding, issuance, transfers, corporate actions, and decommissioning.
slides.pillar3_body: Seven asset types share a common compliance layer while each maintains domain-specific logic and lifecycle behaviors.

slides.title: Timeline vertical 4
slides.milestone1_body: Requirements gathering and compliance framework selection
slides.milestone2_body: Smart contract templates, compliance rules, identity setup
slides.milestone3_body: End-to-end integration testing and security audit

slides.title: Two point contrast
slides.point1_text: Building custom blockchain infrastructure takes 12-18 months and requires a dedicated engineering team.
slides.point2_text: DALP deploys compliant digital asset operations in weeks with pre-built templates and SMART extensions.

slides.title: Vertical process 4
slides.step1_body: Configure token parameters, compliance rules, and permissions via the Asset Designer
slides.step2_body: Deploy ERC-3643 contracts with identity registry and compliance modules
slides.step3_body: Verify identities via OnchainID, issue reusable KYC claims
slides.step4_body: Process corporate actions, distributions, transfers, and redemptions continuously

slides.title: Vertical process 5
slides.step1_body: Gather business requirements, compliance framework, and technical constraints
slides.step2_body: Select asset templates, configure compliance rules, set up identity providers
slides.step3_body: Connect custody, core banking, and reporting systems via REST APIs
slides.step4_body: End-to-end testing, security audit, compliance verification
slides.step5_body: Deploy to production, activate monitoring, begin investor onboarding
